name: Purchase History
query:
SELECT item_code,
(
	SELECT base_rate/conversion_factor
	FROM `tabPurchase Order` PO
	JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` POI on PO.name = POI.parent
	WHERE PO.supplier = 'หมอยา สุรินทร์'
	AND POI.item_code = I.item_code
	ORDER BY PO.creation desc
	LIMIT 1
) as 'หมอยา',
(
	SELECT base_rate/conversion_factor
	FROM `tabPurchase Order` PO
	JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` POI on PO.name = POI.parent
	WHERE PO.supplier = 'บุญเที่ยงเภสัช'
	AND POI.item_code = I.item_code
	ORDER BY PO.creation desc
	LIMIT 1
) as 'บุญเที่ยง',
(
	SELECT base_rate/conversion_factor
	FROM `tabPurchase Order` PO
	JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` POI on PO.name = POI.parent
	WHERE PO.supplier = 'PK เภสัชอำนาจ'
	AND POI.item_code = I.item_code
	ORDER BY PO.creation desc
	LIMIT 1
) as 'PK เภสัชอำนาจ'
FROM `tabItem` I
